bigquery_free_tier_note: BigQuery public datasets are billed by query processing; Google documentation states the first 1 TB per month is free, subject to pricing details.
rules: Run dryRun before every new query.
Use maximumBytesBilled on every non-dry-run query.
Never use SELECT * against patents-public-data tables.
Avoid bulk claims, description, and embedding fields during the first-pass landscape.
Use title, abstract, dates, country_code, family_id, assignee_harmonized, cpc, citation metadata first.
For monthly updates, query only the last 1-2 publication months.
Export website-ready JSON/JSONL and make the website read local/static data, not BigQuery live.
Cache intermediate candidate publication_numbers before expensive detail fetches.
Stop execution if dry-run estimate exceeds the configured per-query byte limit.

dry_run_findings_2026_06_26.decision: Use CPC-first candidate narrowing. Do not run direct title/abstract scans as a scheduled monthly job.
